description: Google HomeGraph is part of Google Home's cloud-to-cloud platform for representing and syncing smart home device and home state data. It provides programmatic access to the Home Graph database used by Google Home integrations.
summary: homegraph.googleapis.com exposes a HomeGraph HTTP API and an MCP endpoint at `/mcp`; the MCP endpoint is publicly reachable without authentication, while the HTTP API is documented but its auth requirements were not confirmed from the scraped sources.
